examples: I do not yet know how to swim breaststroke effectively.
He can swim breaststroke, backstroke and crawl.
The history of breaststroke dates back to the Stone Age.
Rebecca Soni, a surprise gold medalist in Beijing, is a favorite in the 100- and 200-meter breaststroke.
Brenton Rickard, Australia's 100m breaststroke world champion, looked strangely off the pace as he narrowly crept through his semi-final.
